title: Address comments on critical use of oscore_ctx_set_sender_seq before oscore_protect_request and EDHOC export paths
description: Update code comments in oscore.c:663, protect_request check at 1428, and any EDHOC integration points. Ensure after EDHOC export_oscore, the resulting oscore_ctx_create path properly chains to set_sender_seq with NVM-restored or safe-bumped value. Add reboot safety notes per parent epic.
